name: Cash USA
description_short: Cash USA is a Baltimore-based pawn shop operating for over 25 years, buying and selling gold, silver, electronics, watches, and video games with a focus on competitive pricing.
description_long:
Cash USA is an established pawn shop located at 1217 W North Ave in Baltimore, Maryland, with over 25 years of operating history in the local community. The business operates Monday through Saturday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM and positions itself as a destination for fast cash and affordable merchandise.

Cash USA offers a diverse inventory including precious metals (gold and silver), consumer electronics, watches, video games, DVDs, audio equipment, and high-definition televisions. They buy items from customers and resell merchandise across these categories. Their audio equipment section includes speakers, mixers, DJ controllers, CD players, and amplifiers. The DVD and video game inventory is described as extensive, with DVDs priced at $3 each. They carry HDTVs ranging from 19 inches to 60+ inches, stating a focus on models from 2014 and newer.

The company distinguishes itself through competitive pricing claims, product specialization (particularly in audio and video equipment), and staff tenure. Leadership includes CEO Tony Abramov focused on business success, General Manager Randall McClure responsible for pricing accuracy, and Floor Manager Paul Austin, who has been with the business since the early 1990s. The website emphasizes customer service and the familiarity of long-term staff members with the local customer base.

As a pawn shop, Cash USA operates within the collateral-based lending and merchandise resale model standard to the industry. The business relies on customer traffic for both buying items (generating immediate cash for sellers) and selling merchandise. Success depends on inventory turnover, pricing competitiveness, and local market demand. No information is provided regarding loan terms, interest rates, redemption periods, or licensing details.
pros: Over 25 years of established operation in Baltimore community
Extensive inventory across multiple categories including audio, video games, DVDs, and HDTVs
HDTVs limited to 2014+ models, newer stock than some competitors
Long-term staff with deep customer relationships (Floor Manager since early 1990s)
Wide size range for TVs (19 inches to 60+ inches) to fit different budgets
One-stop shopping for audio equipment with specialized sections for mixers, controllers, and amplifiers
cons: No information provided about pawn loan terms, APR, or redemption periods
No details on jewelry or precious metal pricing methodology or buyback rates
Limited hours (closed Sundays) may not accommodate all customer schedules
No online inventory checking or remote appraisal options mentioned
Website lacks customer reviews, ratings, or third-party verification
best_for: Baltimore-area residents seeking immediate cash for used electronics, jewelry, or collectibles
Budget-conscious shoppers looking for discounted DVDs, video games, and used audio equipment
Buyers searching for affordable used HDTVs in the Baltimore metropolitan area
Musicians and audio enthusiasts shopping for used DJ equipment and audio gear
diagnosis: Cash USA is best for Baltimore residents who need immediate cash for used merchandise or want to purchase discounted secondhand electronics, audio equipment, and media. The main caveat is the lack of transparency regarding pawn loan terms, fees, and redemption conditions—critical information for customers considering collateral-based lending rather than outright merchandise sales.
services: Buying gold, silver, and precious metals
Selling used gold and silver items
Audio equipment sales (speakers, mixers, DJ controllers, CD players, amplifiers)
High-definition television sales (19 inches to 60+ inches, 2014+ models)
Immediate cash payments for items sold to the shop
